mapper.select: SELECT recruit_no AS recruitNo, writer_no AS writerNo, title, department, career, recruit_type AS recruitType, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, note, status, reg_date AS regDate FROM recruit ORDER BY recruit_no DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recruit(writer_no, title, department, career, recruit_type, start_date, end_date, note, status, reg_date) VALUES(COALESCE(#{writerNo}, 1), #{title}, #{department}, #{career}, #{recruitType}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{note}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'OPEN'), NOW())
